REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EDUART HOXHA MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO THE PLAINTIFF MARLENE RAMOS. ANY CLAIMS BY MARLENE AGAINST THE MOVING DEFENDANT, THAT AROUSE DURING MARLENE'S TENANCY AND MOVING DEFENDANT'S MANAGEMENT OF SUCH TENANCY SHOULD HAVE BEEN BROUGHT AS A COMPULSORY CROSS-COMPLAINT IN THE PRIOR ACTION. THE MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO JOSE'S CLAIMS IS DENIED. JOSE WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE PRIOR ACTION. MOTION TO STRIKE THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED.
